task.title: Set up backup schedule for {database}
task.description: Complete the following task: Set up backup schedule for {database}. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT change the database schema.
Do NOT touch .env or any credential files.

# search Configuration

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "search-project_db"
user = "app_user"
pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
search_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
